obligations.obligation:
We have noted that the entities covered under the MAT regime are paying
Income Tax as per the MAT rates notified for the respective financial year under the IT
Act, 1961, which is levied on the book profit of the entity computed as per Section 115
JB of the IT Act, 1961.
obligations.short_summary: Basic rule-based detection (LLM skipped for speed)

obligations.obligation:
Section 115 JB (2) defines book profit as net profit in the
statement of Profit and Loss prepared in accordance with Schedule-II of the Companies
Act, 2013, subject to some additions and deductions as mentioned in the IT Act, 1961.
obligations.short_summary: Basic rule-based detection (LLM skipped for speed)

obligations.obligation:
Since the Petitioner has been paying the MAT rates of the respective financial year, the
notified MAT rates for the respective financial year shall be considered as an effective
tax rate for the purpose of grossing up the RoE for truing up the 2019-24 tariff period in
terms of the provisions of the ...
obligations.short_summary: Effective tax rates for grossing up RoE under tariff regulations.

obligations.obligation:
Interest imposed on any
additional income tax demand as per the Assessment Order of the Income Tax
Authorities shall be considered on the actual payment.
obligations.affected_entity: Individual or Entity with Additional Income Tax Demand
obligations.short_summary: Interest on unpaid taxes is due upon actual payment.

obligations.obligation:
However, the penalty (for default
on the part of the Assessee), if any, imposed shall not be taken into account for the
purpose of grossing up of the rate of RoE.
obligations.short_summary: Default penalties excluded from RoE grossing calculations.

obligations.obligation:
Any under recovery or over-recovery of the
grossed-up rates on the RoE after truing up shall be recovered or refunded to the
beneficiaries or the long-term customers, as the case may be on a year-to-year basis.
obligations.short_summary: Recover or refund discrepancies in grossed-up rates annually.
